subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from the tidings of unity, harmony, spirituality and radiance [3.5s]... ...Vigorous steps must be taken to establish the Nineteen Day reception throughout the whole community. Since this Feast is confined to believers only
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از خبر اتحاد و اتفاق و روحانیت و نورانیت... مهمانی نوزده روزه در نهایت همّت بین عموم باید مجری گردد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @importance of community building, @unity of thought and belief, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
